  • weekly picks (Mar 1 week 2026)

    ===This week’s pick===

    03/02

    1. 2602.23399v1 A high-performance cobalt-free cathode for proton-conducting solid oxide fuel cells via multi-element doping in Sr2Fe2O6 (arXiv)
